description: HHA Householder application for planning permission for works or extension to a dwelling — Erection of single storey rear extension and internal alterations
FUL minor application — Erection of 1no. 1 bedroom bungalow and 1no. 2 bedroom bungalow with associated parking and landscaping

address: Garages (rear Of The Lindfield And Treforest Road) Whitworth Avenue, Coventry
description: DCA Approval of details reserved by condition — Submission of details to discharge conditions 3-construction method statement; 4-written scheme of investigation; 5-investigation and risk assessment; 6-remediation scheme; 7-commencement of remediation; 10-arboricultural impact assessment; 11-drainage scheme; 12-materials; 22-boundary fencing and 23-swift boxes: imposed on planning permission FUL/2022/2372 for erection of 1No. 3 bedroomed house with associated parking and landscaping following demolition of 1 No. garage granted 23.05.23
TCA — Trees in a Conservation Area. T1 Damson: Cut back Damson overhanging lawn area. T2 Sycamore: Remove self-set Sycamore to ground level. T3 Lime: Reduce by 3–4m and cut back over garden.
